acceptance_checks.evidence: RUNTIME_PROGRESS_VISIBILITY_ARTIFACT_V1 records status, current stage, completed stages, elapsed time, ETA inputs, and replay-visible authority flags.
runtime-progress renders RUNNING status, runtime id, current stage, deterministic progress bar, elapsed time, estimated remaining time, and current activity.
Replay reconstruction verifies snapshot ordering, status continuity, stage continuity, timestamp ordering, wrapper hashes, and artifact hashes.
RUNTIME_DURATION_HISTORY_V1 supports estimated ETA when remaining stage averages exist and unknown ETA when duration history is incomplete.
Invalid current stage records FAILED_CLOSED visibility without provider, worker, dispatch, authorization, or execution authority.
Replay reconstruction detects timestamp ordering mismatch after replay corruption.
runtime-status and runtime-progress load replay-visible progress without altering the underlying workflow.
Runtime source does not invoke providers, provider proposal production, workers, dispatch, or execution.
